use_cases: Display user profile pictures in dashboards and admin panels
Show user avatars in comment sections and discussion threads
Display participant avatars in video calls and chat interfaces
Show user online/offline status indicators in friend lists
Display avatars in notification dropdowns and user menus
ai_summary: A composite avatar component built with Radix UI primitives and Tailwind CSS featuring Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback, AvatarIndicator, and AvatarStatus sub-components. The AvatarStatus supports variants for online (green), offline (gray), busy (yellow), and away (blue) states. Built with class-variance-authority for flexible variant handling and uses a cn utility for class merging. Suitable for social applications, dashboards, and communication interfaces requiring user representation with status indicators.
